title: epipactis magnibracteata
intro: Epipactis magnibracteata, commonly known as the Large-bracted Helleborine, is a species of orchid native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The Large-bracted Helleborine is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and soothing digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
